title: Bare Bones x Tom's Simple Storage
description: Bare Bones textures for Tom's Simple Storage Mod ! 📦
body:
This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
